contract: interview transcript summary, web footprint findings, business identity, confirmed facts, unverified claims, missing answers, no build output

artifact.summary: Phase 0 DISCOVER (run v2, from-scratch under plugin 92aeaae). Fresh 5-agent web re-sweep on 2026-07-08 with change detection against the archived run. NAP/hours/rating stable. TWO REAL CHANGES FOUND: (1) the second location (3100 6th St SW) is no longer Captains — converted to 'Pita Kabab' (same owner Ray Aqel); stale Captains listings for that address are now a citation-hygiene risk; (2) The Gazette (updated 2026-04) reports mashed potatoes + mac and cheese were ADDED as sides — not in the owner's 2026-07-07 menu paste; owner confirmation required before the menu ships in this run. No owned domain exists (definitive DNS check). Owner statements from the archived run carried as declared owner-provided inputs.
artifact.interviewSummary: Owner statements carried forward as declared owner-provided inputs (recorded in the run brief; originally given 2026-07-07): full priced menu (direct paste — authoritative), call-only contact (no lead form, no SMS), Google 4.4/208 citable with attribution, real brand logo (shark-captain emblem, navy/gold palette drives design), identity (domain/email/GA4) deferred to launch (fixtures through build; Phase 5 preflight expected to fail on them until real values arrive), home page style must match interior pages, 3100 6th St SW excluded. NEW residue for the owner this run: confirm the Gazette-reported sides additions (mashed potatoes, mac and cheese) before the menu ships; confirm hours (Uber Eats surface disagrees); listing-cleanup decision for stale SW 'Captains' listings now pointing at Pita Kabab.

findings: NAP high-confidence and stable: Captains Fish and Chicken, 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids IA 52402 (ZIP+4 -5431), (319) 221-1040
Hours stable across 3 concordant surfaces (Sun 11-8, M-Th 11-10, F-Sa 11-11); still no official source; Uber Eats snippet conflicts
No owned domain — definitive (4 candidate domains unregistered, Apple Maps website falls back to Yelp)
CHANGED: 3100 6th St SW converted to Pita Kabab (same owner); Captains FB page announced it
CHANGED: Gazette (updated 2026-04) reports mashed potatoes + mac and cheese added as sides (owner confirmation pending)
Press: Gazette Dec 2024 catfish feature; cornmeal breading + lemon pepper; owner managed Chicago restaurants since 2006
Delivery listings all live for 1616 (DoorDash/UberEats/Postmates/Grubhub/Seamless); no closure signals
Delivery-pool rating 3.5/53 (Postmates/Uber pool) — materially lower than Google 4.4
Aggregator menus stale (still list calamari — not on owner menu)
discrepancies: Hours: 3 surfaces concordant vs Uber Eats '11:30-11 daily' — owner to confirm; structured hours stay conservative
Menu delta: Gazette-reported sides additions vs owner paste — owner residue question
SW location: now Pita Kabab; stale Captains listings (Grubhub 11805992, Yelp '-2', RestaurantJump inc-52404) are citation-hygiene risks — owner cleanup item, out of site scope
Apple Maps address error: 'First Ave SE' (wrong quadrant) — owner correction item
Captains FB page actively posts Pita Kabab content — brand-signal noise
res-discover/GBP mirror lists 'Dine-in' attribute vs owner takeout-only decision — no dine-in claims on site; GBP attribute review flagged
ownerResidueQuestions: Confirm sides: add mashed potatoes + mac and cheese (Gazette) or keep 2026-07-07 paste as-is?
Identity (domain/email/GA4) still deferred to launch — unchanged?
Stale SW 'Captains' listings cleanup checklist wanted at launch?
